items.name: Accordion

items.name: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service Distro (Amazon EKS-D)

items.name: Arcfra Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Arcfra Kubernetes Engine (AKE) is the Kubernetes service of Arcfra Enterprise Cloud Platform (AECP). It helps enterprises automate the complete production-ready Kubernetes infrastructure, simplifying deployment, management, and usage with an out-of-the-box experience.

items.name: ASUS Cloud Infra

items.name: BoCloud BeyondContainer

items.name: Canonical Charmed Kubernetes

items.description: Performant and easy to deploy Kubernetes cluster with a zero-ops experience and everything needed for a fully functioning cluster (e.g. DNS, gateway, networking).

items.name: CARS TaiChu
items.description: TaiChu Kubernetes engine provides an easy, powerful platform that helps enterprises to use Kubernetes faster and better, including but not limited to installation and maintenance of K8s, deployment, monitoring and management of containerized applications, etc.

items.name: Clush Kube
items.description: Clush Kube is a next-generation enterprise cloud operating solution that provides user management, systems management, PaaS management, DevOps management, helpdesk/service support, and monitoring capabilities.

items.name: Coredge Kubernetes Platform

items.name: DaoCloud Enterprise
items.description: Daocloud helps you provide a reliable and consistent basic support environment to meet the high SLA requirements of enterprise critical applications.

items.name: Desktop Kubernetes

items.name: Diamanti Kubernetes Engine
items.description: Diamanti Kubernetes Engine is a pre-validated and pre-packaged Kubernetes distribution complete with integrated CSI and CNI plugins for modern, distributed applications across the hybrid cloud

items.name: EasyStack Kubernetes Service (EKS)
items.description: EasyStack Kubernetes Service (EKS) is enterprise container platform contains the best of bred capability of an integrated Kubernetes and OpenStack solution.

items.name: Elastisys Welkin® based on Kubespray
items.description: Welkin is a security-hardened Kubernetes distribution. It is designed to meet the tough demands on security and compliance of regulated industries. The distribution includes logging, monitoring, single-sign-on integration with common identity providers, vulnerability scanning, intrusion detection, strict security hardening of the entire platform, and additional safeguards.

items.name: Elastisys Welkin® based on Cluster API
items.description: Welkin is a security-hardened Kubernetes distribution. It is designed to meet the tough demands on security and compliance of regulated industries.

items.name: Ericsson Cloud Container Distribution

items.description: A community Linux distribution designed for container workloads, with high security and low maintenance

items.name: Giant Swarm Managed Kubernetes

items.name: GienTech Container Cloud Platform (GTCP)
items.description: GienTech Container Cloud Platform (GTCP) provides financial level, high availability, and high security container service platform.  GTCP fully follows the conformance with Kubernetes and is flexible to extend more other services with GienTech PAAS products.

items.name: H3C CloudOS
items.description: Based on container technology and pluggable open architecture, H3C CloudOS provides compute, storage, network, security, big data, database, PaaS, and DevOps services as a full-stack cloud management platform. It enables you to perform unified operations and management of various cloud resources.

items.name: HPE Ezmeral Runtime Enterprise
items.description: The HPE Ezmeral Runtime Enterprise is a secure, enterprise-grade platform to deploy cloud-native and non-cloud-native applications at scale across your data centers, multiple clouds, and at the edge.

items.description: The K-PaaS Container Platform provides an independent Kubernetes environment, and developers can easily deploy Kubernetes clusters to build and manage the modern applications anywhere.

items.name: Kubesphere

Our vision is to provide an easier, more friendly and more powerful distributed management platform for individuals and enterprises based on Kubernetes, as well as meet more business demands and help more users to use Kubernetes faster and better.

items.name: Kublr
items.description: Accelerate and control the deployment, scaling, monitoring and management of your containerized applications.

items.name: kURL

items.description: Talos Linux is a single purpose distribution for Kubernetes. It provides an API driven—no SSH—operating system to deploy vanilla Kubernetes anywhere.

items.name: TenxCloud
items.description: TenxCloud is a professional cloud-native application and data platform service provider.

items.name: vCluster
items.description: vCluster lets you create fully functional but virtual Kubernetes clusters. Each vCluster runs inside a namespace of another Kubernetes cluster. Using vCluster is much cheaper than creating separate full-blown clusters and it offers better multi-tenancy and isolation compared to regular namespaces.

items.name: Viettel AI Platform
items.description: Viettel AI Platform is a container management and orchestration platform based on Cloud Native architecture, designed to support AI/ML applications running in Kubernetes environments.

items.name: Viettel Cloud Kubernetes Platform
items.description: Viettel Cloud Kubernetes platform provides container management and orchestration for the applications that based on Cloud Native Architecture and run in a container environment.

items.description: VMware Tanzu Kubernetes Grid is VMware's Kubernetes distribution - built on open source technologies, packaged for enterprise adoption and supported 24x7 by VMware Global Support Services (GSS).

items.description: VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service is VMware's Kubernetes distribution - built on open source technologies, packaged for enterprise adoption and supported 24x7 by VMware Global Support Services (GSS).

items.description: Wind River Cloud Platform is a carrier-grade Kubernetes solution that makes 5G possible by solving the operational problem of deploying and managing distributed edge networks at scale.  It is Wind River's commercial product based on the open source StarlingX project.

items.description: ZStack Cube is a Cloud Native application platform based on Kubernetes.
